# Copilot Instructions for PlasmaBob

PlasmaBob is a 2D platformer game where players control a character named Bob.

## Technique
- Rust
- Bevy


## Story

Plasmabob is a space adventurer that has to fight on several planets to rescue his love.

## Gameplay

- Planets and levels are defined in json files and generated partly procedurally.
- The player can jump, double jump and dash.
- The player can collect coins and power-ups.
- The player can fight enemies and bosses.
- The player can unlock new abilities and costumes.
- The player can explore the levels and find secrets.
- The player can die and respawn at the last checkpoint.
- The player can save and load their progress.
- The player can customize the controls and settings.
